'''âv-w-t-b''' ('''kavawteboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lamp|lamp]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-w-t-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lamp|lamp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-w-t-b
|-
! Lemma
| kavawteboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivawteboko|thivawteboko]] || [[word:jivawteboko|jivawteboko]] || [[word:shivawteboko|shivawteboko]] || [[word:kivawteboko|kivawteboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvawteboko|thuthuvawteboko]] || [[word:jujuvawteboko|jujuvawteboko]] || [[word:shushuvawteboko|shushuvawteboko]] || [[word:kukuvawteboko|kukuvawteboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvawteboko|thuvawteboko]] || [[word:juvawteboko|juvawteboko]] || [[word:shuvawteboko|shuvawteboko]] || [[word:kuvawteboko|kuvawteboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvawteboko|thuvawteboko]] || [[word:juvawteboko|juvawteboko]] || [[word:shuvawteboko|shuvawteboko]] || [[word:kuvawteboko|kuvawteboko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovawteboko|thovawteboko]] || [[word:jovawteboko|jovawteboko]] || [[word:shovawteboko|shovawteboko]] || [[word:kovawteboko|kovawteboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovawteboko|thovawteboko]] || [[word:jovawteboko|jovawteboko]] || [[word:shovawteboko|shovawteboko]] || [[word:kovawteboko|kovawteboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚvawteboko|thĂŚvawteboko]] || [[word:jĂŚvawteboko|jĂŚvawteboko]] || [[word:shĂŚvawteboko|shĂŚvawteboko]] || [[word:kĂŚvawteboko|kĂŚvawteboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavawteboko|thathavawteboko]] || [[word:jajavawteboko|jajavawteboko]] || [[word:shashavawteboko|shashavawteboko]] || [[word:kakavawteboko|kakavawteboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavawteboko|thavawteboko]] || [[word:javawteboko|javawteboko]] || [[word:shavawteboko|shavawteboko]] || [[word:kavawteboko|kavawteboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavawteboko|thavawteboko]] || [[word:javawteboko|javawteboko]] || [[word:shavawteboko|shavawteboko]] || [[word:kavawteboko|kavawteboko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
